title: fumana trisperma
intro: Fumana trisperma, also known as rockrose or five-stamened fumana, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the Cistaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its leaves, flowers, and roots, which contain flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds. Fumana trisperma is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Fumana trisperma can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems and respiratory infections.
